name: General Quality
description: Evaluates responses on general quality dimensions: accuracy, completeness, instruction following, and conciseness.

perspectives.name: Accuracy
perspectives.description: Factual correctness and absence of hallucination
perspectives.criteria: Is the information provided factually correct and grounded?

perspectives.name: Completeness
perspectives.description: All aspects of the request are addressed
perspectives.criteria: Does the response fully address all parts of the user request?
perspectives.scoringGuide: 1=Very incomplete, 2=Missing major parts, 3=Mostly complete, 4=Complete, 5=Thorough and complete

perspectives.name: Instruction Following
perspectives.description: Adherence to system prompt and user instructions
perspectives.criteria: Does the response follow the instructions in the system prompt and user message?
perspectives.scoringGuide: 1=Ignores instructions, 2=Partially follows, 3=Mostly follows, 4=Follows well, 5=Perfectly follows all instructions

perspectives.name: Conciseness
perspectives.criteria: Is the response appropriately concise and free of unnecessary verbosity?
